calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Off Calendar

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-16-2025 Continued To Jun-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-22-2025 Continued To Apr-16-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Bobby Y. Lydon-Lam for Natasha Coyle, Executor (via Zoom).
Lillian E. Ng, Guardian Ad Litem for Trinity Stalzer and Tejal Stalzer, Minors (via Zoom).

Discussions were held regarding procedural issues raised in the Examiner's notes. Mr. Lydon-Lam explained that additional time is required due to errors in the estate accounting. He stated that there were issues involving multiple accounts held by the decedent with Charles Schwab, and clarification from Charles Schwab is pending.

Ms. Ng stated she has no objection to Mr. Lydon-Lam's request for additional time, but that she was unaware of certain issues, as she had not been noticed regarding the status report.

The court directed Mr. Lydon-Lam to ensure compliance with SF Local Rule 14.35J, and that a Proof of Service and a Proposed Order must be provided with the next submission.

The court continued the matter to April 16, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, with all required filings due by April 9, 2025.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Continued To Jan-22-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-15-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-03-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 21, 2017 is admitted to probate. Natasha Coyle is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cabrera. Not reported.
